eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Coconino, AZ; at 8:02 PM on JUN 27, 2026 Effective until 4:02 AM JUN 28, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: URGENT from CCSO: All zones in Kachina Village and Forest Highlands are being placed in SET status due to the Pocket Fire. Residents are urged to remain aware of emerging hazards, prepare for potential evacuation orders, and stay tuned to official media sources.
